name: Brick Breaker Premium 2
short_description: An arcade classic returns with a full-on sequel to the original brick-breaker. Play as Blippy and defend Earth from The Little Snarfers across 40+ challenging levels. Earn brand-new ending cutscenes if you can beat the game!
detailed_description:
An Arcade Classic Returns!

An arcade classic returns with a full-on sequel to the original brick-breaker.

You’re Blippy—the heroic paddle—back to defend planet Earth from a new threat.

The Little Snarfers are here, and the challenge ramps up fast across over 40 brand-new levels. Smash through brick patterns, stay alive under pressure, and lean on classic power-ups to keep your run going.

Beat the full game and you’ll earn brand-new ending cutscenes—if you can finish what you started.

Features

  • Over 40 brand-new challenging levels to complete

  • Play as Blippy, the heroic paddle

  • Continuation of the heroic storyline from the original

  • Classic power-ups to swing tough stages your way

  • New additional small bricks for tighter, trickier clears

  • Battle the new threat: The Little Snarfers

  • Unlock brand-new ending cutscenes by completing the game

  • Gamepad Support
